pkg-static: rubygem-json_pure-1.8.2 conflicts with rubygem-i18n-0.7.0,2 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/lib/ruby/gems/2.1/doc/i18n-0.7.0/rdoc/GetText/PoParser.html
